# ONLYMORE Group
> Holding fintech mutualist. Inclusion financiere par le sport.
> Fondee 2025, Rodilhan (30230), Occitanie, France.
> Contact: onlymore2024@gmail.com

## Subsidiaries
- CROWNIUM: fan co-ownership fintech for sports clubs (mutualist SAS model)
- COLHYBRI: local commerce SaaS solidarity platform
- DOJUKU SHINGI: martial arts AI app
- ONLYMORE FINANCE: Lombard credit structure
- PLUMAYA Editions: publishing and IP (SHINGAN notation system)

## Key URLs
- https://www.onlymore.group/fr
- https://crownium.club
- https://colhybri.com

## Mission
"Que chacun puisse vivre et prosperer la ou il a grandi."
Reducing poverty, stopping talent drain, fighting forced emigration.
Sport as the economic lever for local retention.
